---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Server Assistant
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem / use case**
What are you trying to do? Concrete "As a moderator, I want to… because…" descriptions land best.

**The idea**
What you'd like the bot to do.

**Alternatives you've considered**
Any workarounds you're using today.

**Anything else**
Examples from other bots, mockups, or extra context.

---
*Tip: you can also vote on existing ideas on the [public roadmap](https://wandweb2.github.io/server-assistant-docs/roadmap/) — the highest-voted items get prioritised.*
